---
title: "Paper title goes here"
description: "One-line abstract or summary."
date: "2026-06-07"
author: "Krimler"
# Set this to your PDF's filename in papers/files/
pdf: "files/your-paper.pdf"
---

```{=html}
<p><a class="btn btn-primary" href="files/your-paper.pdf" download>⬇ Download PDF</a></p>
<embed src="files/your-paper.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="900px" />
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Notes / context
Add commentary, related blog posts, or links to the code here.
:::
